steps: Go to https://mailchimp.com and log in to your account
Click your profile icon (avatar) in the bottom-left corner
Click 'Extras' in the top navigation, then select 'API keys'
In the 'Your API keys' section, click 'Create A Key'
Enter a descriptive name for the key so you can identify it later
Click 'Copy Key to Clipboard' immediately — the full key is only shown once
Also note your Mailchimp data center prefix (e.g., 'us1') from your account URL — you need this to construct API URLs

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API Key
credential_fields.description: Your Mailchimp Marketing API key. The key ends with a data center suffix like '-us1'.

notes: The API key suffix (e.g., '-us1') indicates your data center — the base URL for API calls is https://<dc>.api.mailchimp.com/3.0
Full API key is shown only once at creation — copy it immediately
API key grants full access to your Mailchimp account — treat it like a password
You need Manager or Admin permissions to generate API keys
Free plan available for up to 500 contacts and 1,000 emails/month
Mailchimp uses HTTP Basic Auth with 'anystring' as username and the API key as password when using the key

test_endpoint.description: Ping the API to verify credentials — returns a health check response
